SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils

パッケージ org.commonutils.util

package org.commonutils.util
Helpers for Collection and Map: null-safe emptiness, sizing, membership, ordered endpoints, and typed map reads with defaults. Pair with StringSupport and NumberSupport when values need string or number normalization first.

Main entry points

  • CollectionSupport — collections and SequencedCollection accessors
  • MapSupport — configuration-style getters with fallbacks
  • クラス
    クラス
    説明
    CollectionSupport
    Static helpers shared by arbitrary Collection implementations (List, Set, Queue, …): presence checks, safe CollectionSupport.size(Collection), containment tests between collections, and ordered endpoints via SequencedCollection where applicable.
    MapSupport
    Static helpers for Map work: null-safe emptiness checks, default substitution, and typed reads with fallbacks.
